programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Radio Wol'. The Iron Chicken's radio breaks down, so she and the Wols create their own radio station.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Yoga Ball'. Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Bike'. Bluey is struggling to learn how to ride her bike. But as she and Dad watch her friends determination with their own tasks, Bluey is inspired to give it another try.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E98 - Baby Race'. Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies. Bluey learnt to roll over first, but Judo was the first to crawl, so then it became a race to see who was going to walk first.

programme.desc: 'S3/E122 - Pizza Girls'. Bluey and Bingo make mud pizzas and deliver them to the grown-ups, but their pedal car's wheel keeps falling off.

programme.desc: 'S2/E20 - Peeping Picture'. Watch what happens when some lucky Mini Makers make a room fit for a king.

programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Evil Pea's Big Freeze'. Evil Pea freezes the veggies so she can take over the whole supermarket. Chilli's heat unfreezes Supertato who then races on lolly-stick skis to thwart Evil Pea and save the day.

programme.title: Mister Maker Around the World
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. In South Africa Mister Maker meets Mini Makers and creates a sensational shark picture.

programme.title: Supertato

programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - It's time to put on a show'. JoJo doesn't know what to do with her odd socks, so Gran Gran suggests they put on a puppet show! The two of them turn the socks into puppets, ready for a show in the garden.

programme.desc: 'S2/E73 - Escape'. When Mum and Dad describe a made-up world where they can relax without the girls, Bluey and Bingo decide to burst into their fantasy and chase them down. How will Mum and Dad escape?

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E123 - Driving'. With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E60 - Daddy Dropoff'. Dad refuses to be late dropping off Bluey and Bingo at kindy and school, but the girls make Dad play so many games, they quickly derail his plan.

programme.title: Noddy: Toyland Detective
programme.desc: 'S1/E29 - The Case of the Toyland Mischief Maker'. When Big Ears' teapot goes missing, Noddy unexpectedly finds it hanging from a lamp post.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Postman Pat and the Big Bob Bell'. Big Bob, the bell from the church tower of Rev Timm's church has been away to get mended. Pat has to deliver it to the church in time for the installation people to pop it in the belltower.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E95 - Handstand'. At a party, Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills, while Nanna can't find a way to make herself useful. They're both feeling a bit lost, until they find each other.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S25/E5 - South Park'. After 24 years of getting warmed up, South Park finally hits its stride in its hilarious and surprising 25th series.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S25/E5 - South Park'. An animated adult series featuring four foul-mouthed, trash-talking fourth graders: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman. The kids live in the Colorado town of South Park where weird things keep happening.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - The Unkindest Cut of All'. An irate neighbour presents Frasier with a litter of puppies which she claims are Eddie's.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Slow Tango in South Seattle'. Frasier is outraged to learn that Thomas Jay Fallow, an author acquaintance from his days in Boston, has used the story of Frasier's first sexual experience.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Duke's, We Hardly Knew Ye'. Frasier and Niles are upset when they learn that they're investors in the company slated to demolish their father's favourite hangout.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - The Matchmaker'. Frasier's plan to 'fix up' Daphne with his new boss goes awry when Frasier learns his secret.

programme.title: Key & Peele
programme.desc: 'S3/E9 - Meagan's Fight'. Sketches include the return of Meagan, Jordan trying to look cool at a strip club, and the guys putting on a funk show for the ages.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S4/E10 - Horrible Holidays'. The series with the funniest clips on the internet is back. Get ready to enjoy the most fantastic fails and glorious mishaps. From pets off the leash to driving disasters and mad mums.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S4/E11 - Parks and Recreation'. The series with the funniest clips on the internet is back. Get ready to enjoy the most fantastic fails and glorious mishaps. From pets off the leash to driving disasters and mad mums.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S4/E12 - Teenage Kicks'. The series with the funniest clips on the internet is back. Get ready to enjoy the most fantastic fails and glorious mishaps. From pets off the leash to driving disasters and mad mums.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S4/E13 - On Ice'. The series with the funniest clips on the internet is back. Get ready to enjoy the most fantastic fails and glorious mishaps. From pets off the leash to driving disasters and mad mums.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S4/E14 - States of Stupidity'. The series with the funniest clips on the internet is back. Get ready to enjoy the most fantastic fails and glorious mishaps. From pets off the leash to driving disasters and mad mums.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S4/E15 - Tiny Terrors'. The series with the funniest clips on the internet is back. Get ready to enjoy the most fantastic fails and glorious mishaps. From pets off the leash to driving disasters and mad mums.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S4/E16 - On The Job'. The series with the funniest clips on the internet is back. Get ready to enjoy the most fantastic fails and glorious mishaps. From pets off the leash to driving disasters and mad mums.

programme.title: Most Ridiculous
programme.desc: 'S4/E16 - On the Job'. Enjoy the very best clips of bungling builders, woeful waiters and office pranksters.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - See Dad Teach Emily To Drive'. When a girl gives Emily a hard time about not having a date to the school dance, David sends her flowers. However, the note gets lost and she now thinks she has a secret admirer.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - See Dad Run A Fever'. The Hobbs family reluctantly attend an anniversary weekend party for their cousin, Fred, only to discover that once again Fred has taken advantage of David's star power.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - See Dad Lose The Forest For The Tree House'. Hoping to bond with Joe, David decides to help him build a treehouse, but he isn't quite the craftsman he thinks he is.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - See Dad Run Joe Into Detention'. Joe is sleepwalking due to nerves about kissing Amanda for the first time. However, David thinks he's nervous about a fight at school and later gives him terrible first-kiss advice.

programme.title: See Dad Run
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - See Dad See Dad Run'. Marcus' wife, Alicia, arrives home from Europe surprising everyone with her new look but the Hobbs can't keep up with their friend's new lifestyle!

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Beloved Infidel'. After seeing an emotional meeting between Martin and an old family friend, Frasier and Niles begin to suspect that their father had an affair when they were boys.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Selling Out'. Frasier signs with Bulldog Briscoe's agent, Bebe Glaser, who convinces him to do commercial endorsements.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Oops'. Frasier hears an office rumour that Bulldog is going to be fired, Bulldog overhears, flies off the handle and quits his job, insulting the station manager.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Death Becomes Him'. Frasier becomes obsessed with his own mortality after a doctor his own age dies of a sudden heart attack. He begins making plans for his own funeral, and trying to discover how the man died.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Guess Who's Coming to Breakfast'. Frasier is surprised and flustered when a neighbour spends the night with Martin, and quickly makes a fool of himself talking about it over the air.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Can't Buy Me Love'. Frasier and Bulldog participate in a bachelor auction to benefit Martin's police association.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - The Show Where Lilith Comes Back'. Lilith visits Frasier in Seattle, wondering if there's any chance of reconciliation.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - A Mid-Winter Night's Dream'. Worried that Niles's infatuation with Daphne is getting out of control, Frasier suggests that he try spicing up his sex life with Maris.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - You Can't Tell A Crook by His Cover'. When Roz gets scammed by a con artist, Frasier boasts that he's too smart for such tricks. Martin challenges him to figure out which of his three poker buddies is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Supermarket Story'. After Doug informs Carrie of his plans to leave her, she decides she wants to go to China and adopt the child they were going to get without him.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Noel Cowards'. Doug's kingdom comes under attack when his recently widowed father-in-law moves in rather than go to a retirement home, turning Doug's TV room into Arthur's bedroom.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Fixer Upper'. Doug is worried that Carrie has put on a few pounds since their marriage and may wind up resembling her mother.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Best Man'. Doug fears that Carrie's new job is taking her away from him.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Love! Lies! Bleeding!'. Becker deals with a series of Valentine's Day issues with his usual cynical approach, but a late night hospital visit abruptly softens his perspective

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Limits And Boundaries'. Becker is less than thrilled when Fred, his estranged father, makes an unannounced visit.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S1/E17 - Partial Law'. Becker finds himself covering for the unsympathetic daughter of a patient. Reggie recommends Becker to an odd customer at the diner who is convinced that he is good friends with God.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S1/E112 - Activate Your Choices'. When Reggie is enthralled with a new empowering author, Becker discovers that the author and content of the book hit close to home.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Audrey's Sister'. When Russell finds out that Audrey's sister, Barbara, is having problems in her marriage, he takes her out, which infuriates Audrey.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Mr Fix It'. Jeff tries to help a situation Audrey has with one of their neighbours by confronting the issue head on, but soon discovers he may have done more harm than good.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Guy Code'. Jeff asks for Audrey's silence about his friend's infidelity, telling her that it's part of the 'guy code.' Adam's pretty, new assistant is incompetent, but he won't fire her.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Bag Ladies'. Russell dates a 'bag lady' and experiences the pitfalls of the relationship. Adam gives into Jennifer's wishes and gets a 'man bag'. Jeff and Audrey try to start rumours about their sex life.

programme.title: Rules Of Engagement
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Old School Jeff'. Jeff skips a wedding to spend a night out with the guys. Audrey worries that he'll get drunk and do something embarrassing.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Dog Days'. Doug discovers a secret about Richie's wife.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S1 - C***py Birthday'. When Doug's favourite aunt comes to visit, Arthur falls in love with her.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S9/E7 - Home Cheapo'. Doug realises that befriending Arthur has some real benefits.

programme.title: The King Of Queens
programme.desc: 'S9/E8 - Offensive Fowl'. It turns out that, unbeknownst to Doug, the engagement ring he bought for Carrie is worth a lot of money.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Everybody Hates Caruso'. Caruso gives up his role as school bully after getting bullied himself. Without him to establish the school's hierarchy and everyone vying to fill his shoes, chaos erupts.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E3 - Everybody Hates Driving'. Chris has to reluctantly train the family's new dog into a security dog after their house is robbed, but he just wants a pet.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - Everybody Hates The Guidance Counselor'. Chris joins the school newspaper's writing staff. His writing skills are not that good so he invents a scandalous story that causes panic.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E5 - Everybody Hates Bed Stuy'. With no extracurricular activities to his name, Chris decides to join the writing staff of the school newspaper.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: 'S3/E6 - Everybody Hates Bad Boys'. When Chris discovers that his long-standing crush, Tasha, likes 'bad boys', he decides it's time to lose his 'nice guy' image and win over the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Welcome to the Stolen Sneakers'. When Malcolm is robbed and won't reveal the culprit, Calvin and Dave team up to crack the case of the missing sneakers.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Welcome to the Fundraiser'. Tina gets carried away when she tries to help Gemma ace her first fundraiser as school principal. Also, Dave aids Calvin in his efforts to win a special silent-auction prize for his mom.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Welcome to Grover's Birthday'. When Dave and Gemma's elaborate plans for Grover's 7th birthday party go awry, Malcolm and Marty come to the rescue.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E13 - Welcome to Fight Night'. Calvin reluctantly invites Dave to join his guys' night at home with Malcolm and Marty, while Gemma and Tina take their first girls' trip to Vegas.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Welcome to the Yard Sale'. Dave convinces Calvin to hold a yard sale, but when longtime neighborhood resident Miss Simpson makes a purchase Calvin quickly regrets.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Truth And Consequences'. When Becker's apartment is broken into, he finds himself hunting for a new computer after his insurance investigator brands his old one worthless.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Drive, They Said'. Becker shows his softer side by taking care of a stray cat. Jake gets tricked into divulging all of the details of his sensual dream about Reggie.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Lucky Day'. Becker is thrilled when he makes all the morning traffic lights as well as landing a prime parking space at the diner. To top it off, a stranger returns his lost wallet.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: 'S25/E6'. After 24 years of getting warmed up, South Park finally hits its stride in its hilarious and surprising 25th series.

programme.desc: 'S26/E1'. An animated adult series featuring four foul-mouthed, trash-talking fourth graders: Stan, Kyle, Kenny and Cartman. The kids live in the Colorado town of South Park where weird things keep happening.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: 'S4/E20 - Andrzej Kunowski'. 41-year-old Andrzej Kunowski was a prolific paedophile who entered the UK illegally in 1996. Within 7 months he murdered a 12-year-old schoolgirl in Hammersmith. The crime went unsolved until 2002.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers

programme.desc: 'S8/E2 - Frozen: Stay With Me'. Wes and Jermaine struggle after drinking tainted water. Teams fortify their shelters against the cold and medics must intervene after a fainting spell.

programme.title: Hoffman Family Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Hoff To A Rough Start'. Todd Hoffman brings a wash plant and all-star crew to his remote Alaskan claim to mine 1,000 ounces of gold. When they struggle, his son Hunter has a bold fix.

programme.title: Hoffman Family Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Big Iron, Bigger Problems'. Todd gets Holy Roller running and catching nuggets. But unloading the mammoth wash plant leads to a mammoth fight between father and son.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S14/E9 - 14/9'. More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how headphones, diving regulators and reflector light bulbs are made.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Gabriel Iglesias' Fluffy Tank'. The duo attempt to combine Gabriel Iglesias' love of vintage buses into a unique pair of tanks, but a grand theft heist at ATM may put on the brakes.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Dwight Howard's Slithering Slam Dunk'. A call from NBA star Dwight Howard sends the duo to Houston. But Howard doesn't just want a fish tank, he also wants a new home for his snakes.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: 'S3/E15 - Lost In The Forest'. Go behind the scenes with Pete Nelson as he shares some of his favourite, never-before-seen 'Treehouse Masters' moments, including lots of lost footage.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: 'S13/E2'. At a giant mid-Wales market, Drew has the pick of over 1000 stalls showcasing world-class pieces. He spies a 200-year-old Windsor chair in the best condition he's ever seen.

programme.title: Baggage Battles
programme.desc: 'S3/E9'. The baggage battlers head to a music icons auction in New York. They find a gold disc for the Pink Floyd album 'Dark Side Of The Moon' and a nude photo of Madonna.

programme.title: Baggage Battles
programme.desc: 'S3/E10'. The baggage battlers head to an auction in Denver, where they duel over a zebra rug. They also show an interest in some sealed lots, but will the contents be of value?

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - Treehouse Z'. Pete connects with old friends to build them a Zen-like sanctuary in the trees. The team stays calm in constructing a retreat with a view of the Blue Ridge Mountains.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Apres Skihouse Treehouse'. Pete designs a ski chalet treehouse that comes complete with a secret bedroom and a double-sided fireplace to keep guests warm both inside and out.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - Camo Treehouse'. Pete designs a treehouse fit for the ultimate survivalist. He designs a camouflage structure with a luxurious interior that could pamper any hardened champion.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Magical Modern Treehouse'. Pete works his magic in Georgia to build a treehouse the breaks all the country rules, and then visits racing legend Dale Earnhardt Jr.'s own treehouse.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Penn & Teller Monkey Magic'. Wayde and Brett drop in on world famous magicians, Penn and Teller who want a tank built in honour of their 40th anniversary together.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: 'S15/E1'. Parker, Rick and Tony return to the Yukon to chase $40 million in gold. The fate of the Beets family dynasty shifts when Kevin strikes out on his own.

programme.title: Fastest Cars In The Dirty South
programme.desc: 'S2/E2 - Fast Focus'. The 256 takes a young racer who is losing big this racing season and tries to turn him into a big dog at one of Alabama's biggest grudge race events.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Farmtruck And AZN
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Farmtruck dreams up a vehicle propelled solely by air pressure, but getting AZN into the pilot's seat will take some convincing.

programme.desc: 'S14/E10'. More everyday items are put under the microscope as we discover how fly fishing reels, house paint, weaving looms and ice makers are made.

programme.title: Hoffman Family Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Mine On The Line'. Smoke from a nearby fire has the Hoffmans on edge and praying for rain. But torrential storms may flood the mine and threaten their paydirt.

programme.title: Hoffman Family Gold
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Jack Attack'. As Todd's Holy Roller plant runs non-stop, Hunter's Black Pearl plant is finally ready to wash dirt. Plus, an epic father-and-son showdown puts the season in jeopardy.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue...
programme.desc: 'Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan. S2/E5'. Married Montana miners dream of building a gold mining dynasty on their nugget-rich claim. But Freddy and Juan could face their first failed rescue.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue...
programme.desc: 'Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan. S2/E3 - True Gold'. A trio of young Idaho miners struggles to find enough gold. To save them, Freddy and Juan bring new ingenuity to keep their mine alive.

programme.title: Alien Sharks: Strange New Worlds
programme.desc: Wildlife biologist Forrest Galante explores stunning kelp forests and ocean depths never seen by humans to study the unusual sharks around the tip of South Africa.

programme.title: Monster Mako
programme.desc: Mako sharks are the fastest of all species of sharks in the world. Scientists go on expedition to examine the little-known large Mako sharks off the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Lost Monster Files
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. The team investigates a murder mystery involving the Wildman of Minnesota. They uncover a major find at the farm where the body was last seen.

programme.title: Alien Invasion: Hudson Valley
programme.desc: Ben Hansen and a team of UFO experts investigate a recent spike in extra-terrestrial activity in New York's Hudson Valley.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: 'S4/E1 - Bigfoot Island'. After finding strange evidence in California, the team journeys to Prince of Wales Island, Alaska, to find Bigfoot. There, mysterious screams terrify the locals.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S3/E53 - Moon Madness'. Luna Girl steals the moon crystal to power up her Luna Fortress' Mega-Magnet, which creates a portal that pulls stuff up from the city. The PJ Masks go off to the moon to stop her!

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S3/E54 - Armadylan and Robette Rule/Armadylan Zen'. Armadylan and sidekick Robette fight with Romeo to determine whose sidekick is better. After Armadylan loses his temper again, the PJ Masks take him on a zen trip.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Queen Alice /A Kuku Surprise'. The Queen's out for the day, so Alice takes her place. When Saeed moves into Mushroom Forest, Alice and friends help welcome him to his new home!

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E24 - Back to the Root/Alice the Piefectionist'. Cheshire leads Alice on the hunt for her great-grandmother's root cellar. Alice tries to create the perfect pie for Harvest Day so she almost misses the celebration itself!

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Sunny-side-up/A Supreme Pizza Problem'. With Wonderland being half day and night, Alice sees a lot of Wonderlanders rely on the sun! Alice and her friends bake a pizza for the Queen's Pizza Party.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S3/E70 - Grow Webs Grow/ Rio in Space'. Lizard's monster plant takes over the city. Doc Ock captures the Spider CRAWL-R while on a mission in space, so Miles and his mom, Rio, work together to free their ship.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S3/E76 - Curse of the Corn Dog King, The/ Zola's Halloween Heist'. The Corn Dog King haunts the Amusement Park, ruining the Halloween fun. Zola puts grown-ups under a spell to get them to bring him all the Halloween candy.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Spidey to the Power of Three'. Spidey reminds Spin and Ghost-Spider to work as a team to track Rhino. Spidey learns about patience when he and Black Panther must take down Doc Ock!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S2/E45 - King Ludwig's Day Off/No Horsing Around'. King Ludwig spends the day at the Funhouse, so he can do things all by himself. Minnie and Daisy have new horses for a show. Daisy learns to take care of her horse.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S2/E46 - Minnie's Snow Ball!/ the Snow Princess'. Minnie's picnic gets rained out, so she moves the picnic to Fairy Square. The gang journeys to Winter Mountain in hopes of meeting the Snow Princess.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S2/E47 - Dino See, Dino Do / Pete the Mighty Baby!'. Mickey and the gang head to Prehistoric World for a sleepover with some baby dinos. Donald and Pete ignore warnings and step into a fountain of youth, which turns them into babies!

programme.title: Eureka!
programme.desc: 'S1 - Tusks, Trouble, and All/Absoflutely Fabulous'. Eureka and her friends, Pepper and Barry, free a woolly mammoth. Eureka tries to befriend a flute player in her class by inventing her a new flute.

programme.title: Eureka!
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Everybody Lava Pizza/Prehistoric Class Pets'. Eureka has ideas to help her mom's restaurant, but accidentally unleashes a steam geyser instead. Dipply follows Pepper to school one day, inspiring other pets to do the same.

programme.title: Eureka!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Newsline Biz
programme.desc: Reporting the latest business, finance and economic news with added analysis from studio guests.

programme.title: Bento Expo
programme.desc: Marc creates Japanese-style fritters with rainbow veggies, Maki uses sweet-and-sour chicken to make some Chinese steamed buns, we also meet a Dutch family who have embraced slow life and slow food!

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Clay developed by a downtown Tokyo pencil maker using sawdust from the pencil-making process feels just like ordinary clay, is eco-friendly and behaves just like wood when dry.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Smalltown Dojos Go Global
programme.desc: A town in Shizuoka is drawing visitors from Australia to Mexico thanks to kendo practitioner Graham Sayer - he says giving back to the community embodies the spirit of the Way of the Sword.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: A Spring Party: We visit one of the most famous cherry blossom spots in Edo, flower viewing parties were for eating, drinking, making merry and also an opportunity for young men and women to mingle.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: The Jomon period dates roughly from 13,000 to 300 B.C. - we examine various aspects of Jomon society with footage from time-lapse creator Shimizu Daisuke. This time: the Oyu Stone Circles.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: 'Japanology Plus' explores Japanese life and culture - in this digest, we look at karakuri ningyo, or mechanical dolls. Their clever mechanisms have been entertaining the public for centuries.

programme.title: Spiritual Explorers
programme.desc: Miyadaiku are carpenters who specialise in shrines and temples - explore the spirit and wisdom infused in the woodworking techniques of these artisans handed down through the ages.

programme.title: Nun's Cookbook
programme.desc: The nuns of Otowasan Kannonji Temple show us how to make a simple autumn treat that's both beautiful to look at and tasty to eat - just boil edible chrysanthemums and serve with sweet vinegar.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Muginoko Village
programme.desc: Many parents who have a history of abuse have been saved by a unique community - it is called Muginoko Village, which helps children with developmental disabilities and their parents to grow together.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: The Hokkaido Watershed Traverse
programme.desc: A 27-year-old Japanese mountaineer achieved the feat of crossing a watershed that runs across Hokkaido - this documentary chronicles his journey as he confronts the harsh nature and examines his life.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: A doctor can change the future of lung cancer, the cancer that causes the most deaths - we follow him as he pursues new cancer treatment at the head of a team of the world's best in Toronto in Canada.

programme.title: Dining With The Chef
programme.desc: Featured recipe: Rice Gratin with White Miso Sauce. Learn about easy, delicious, and healthy cooking with Chef Rika in five minutes!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: A Final Lesson
programme.desc: What if this was the final lesson you would ever teach? Atomic bomb survivor and former teacher Kajiya Fumiaki prepares one last lesson for the children of an Osaka elementary school.

programme.title: Viewpoint Science
programme.desc: This proactive science education programme encourages primary and lower secondary school children to discover and investigate the mysteries which puzzle them.

programme.title: Story Land
programme.desc: Leading actors take turns as solo storytellers to act and recite traditional folk tales loved in Japan for centuries - watch out for some delightful illustrations too!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Samurai Chonmage Truth
programme.desc: The chonmage is the distinctive hairstyle of the samurai - through interviews and experiments, we set out to discover the truth about when and how it came into being.

programme.title: Cinematic Journey
programme.desc: Join our explorers as they pursue the cinematic beauty of Japan - in this episode, Kyle Card hikes the newly-designated long trail around majestic Mount Fuji and discovers its secrets.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Discover the unique traditional method of roof thatching that uses Hinoki cypress bark.

programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Japan's Top Inventions
programme.desc: The stories behind hit Japanese products and top creations for niche markets - this time, seismic oil dampers and fabric trim.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life

programme.title: The Last Word With Shahan Ramkissoon
programme.desc: 'S7/E16'. Shahan Ramkissoon talks to newsmakers and reveals his uncensored opinions about what's happening in South Africa. He also brings in some comedy, by looking at the lighter side of news.

programme.title: Devi
programme.desc: 'S18/E7'. JMPD faces backlash over roadblocks while Exclusive Leather owner fails to deliver on promised luxury furniture orders.

programme.title: Portillo's Greatest Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Railways and Nationhood'. Michael Portillo explores how railways have contributed to the creation of countries, linking people across deserts and mountains and binding together different ethnicities and religions.

programme.title: Exploring India with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The North'. In Varanasi, Bettany takes part in a Hindu ritual which helps her process her own bereavement. She also takes a boat out to the Lake Palace on an island in Lake Pichola.

programme.title: Exploring India with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The South'. Bettany enjoys the breath-taking journey through the Tamil Nadu hills, between Mettupalayam and Udhagamandalam (Ooty).

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S9/E1 - Portugal'. Adventurer Ben Fogle journeys to the mountains of central Portugal, to live with Alex, a British man who traded in his lucrative retail career for his own mountainside hideaway.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S11/E3 - On the Auroras'. Alaskans confront the environment, and themselves, as winter bears down.

programme.title: Ancient Engineering
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. Building for God reached a high point in the Middle Ages when a new engineering movement emerged in Europe, using pioneering architecture to create a glimpse of heaven.

programme.title: Portillo's Greatest Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Railways and Nationhood'. Michael Portillo explores how railways have contributed to the creation of countries, linking people across deserts and mountains and binding together different ethnicities and religions.

programme.title: Exploring India with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - The North'. In Varanasi, Bettany takes part in a Hindu ritual which helps her process her own bereavement. She also takes a boat out to the Lake Palace on an island in Lake Pichola.

programme.title: Fatal Forecast
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Thunderstorms'. There are about 2,000 thunderstorms taking place on Planet Earth at any given time. Despite their exhilarating beauty, they can be deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Wildfire'. This episode looks at the impact of wildfires and the deadly infernos they cause. Wildfires show no signs of stopping and their inexorability on this planet is truly terrifying.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Italy'. We're celebrating Italy and following the Neapolitan Line. Travelling west from the gelato shops of the seaside town of Pescara, we cross Italy through the wild Apennine Mountains.

programme.title: World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - Africa'. Starting from one of the world's most remote cities, Walvis Bay, in Namibia, we roll 1,500 miles through the Kalahari desert to Pretoria, South Africa's Executive Capital.

programme.title: Treasures with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Jordan'. Bettany explores three biblical sites in Jordan: Bethany Beyond the Jordan, the Dead Sea, and Machaerus, where John the Baptist was imprisoned and killed.

programme.title: Treasures with Bettany Hughes
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Albania'. Bettany explores mountainous Albania, and journeys to epic fortress towns, breath-taking archaeological sites and encounters a richly diverse history and culture.

programme.title: Pompeii: The New Dig
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Episode 2'. The dig continues and the all-Italian team of archaeologists discover the remains of a horse harness. As they cannot find any remains of the horse they wonder if it managed to escape Pompeii as the eruption began.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Steve's River Expedition'. Steve heads to Suriname, a country with more forest than anywhere else on earth. He kayaks upriver in search of some deadly critters.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Saving the Pangolins'. Steve takes a special journey to meet the most trafficked animal on earth - the pangolin. He meets the people working tirelessly to save them.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: 'S5/E6 - The Deep'. Steve heads down in a deep-sea submersible to explore the ocean depths like never before. He then travels to the Natural History Museum to meet some of the weirdest animals from the deep.

programme.title: One Cup: A Thousand Stories
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Tea Without Limits'. This final episode is about a challenge: it is about visionary tea-makers throwing a gauntlet down, challenging humanity to change their tastes and habits - to step out into an exciting future.

programme.title: Portillo's Greatest Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Political Railways'. Michael explores how politics, domestic and international, have shaped the railways. He recalls the political decisions which green lit the great North American transcontinental railways.

programme.title: Portillo's Greatest Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Railways and Tourism'. Michael Portillo looks at how railways gave birth to modern tourism, as the first railway companies were quick to spot a business opportunity.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: 'S4/E2'. A 19-year-old girl and her father go face-to-face with a fast-moving inferno as wildfires rip through Victoria, Australia. In the French Alps, two British skiers are engulfed by an avalanche.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Episode 6'. Lion numbers continue to grow, but there's not enough food to go around. A lioness mum risks her life to feed her five cubs. And Xudum's new-born leopard cubs face a deadly threat.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: 'S5/E7 - Giant Otter Stakeout'. Steve heads into the heart of the Suriname Jungle. He goes in search of poison dart frogs, deadly snakes and hopes to find the elusive giant river otter.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: 'S5/E8 - South America's Wildest'. Steve searches for deadly animals living in the capital of Suriname. From snakes in people's gardens to snail-catching kites and one of the deadliest snakes on earth.

programme.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Kalahari'. Simon Reeve crosses the parched desert of southern Africa, tracking wildebeest with the famous hunter gatherers of the Kalahari before heading to the oasis of the Okavango Delta.

programme.title: Pompeii: The New Dig
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Episode 3'. In this final episode, the archaeologists complete the excavation of a wealthy residence, a bakery, and a laundry and, in doing so, discover evidence of what people were doing in the city during its final hours.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E17 - New Country'. Sue is out to hunt caribou. Ricko travels to a natural hot spring. Jessie moves to Brushkana. The Hailstones build a wall tent and go fishing.

programme.title: Solar System
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Dark Worlds'. Professor Brian Cox explores the solar system's hidden realms, between and beyond the planets, where countless worlds lie hiding in the darkness.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: 'S5/E7 - Giant Otter Stakeout'. Steve heads into the heart of the Suriname Jungle. He goes in search of poison dart frogs, deadly snakes and hopes to find the elusive giant river otter.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: 'S5/E8 - South America's Wildest'. Steve searches for deadly animals living in the capital of Suriname. From snakes in people's gardens to snail-catching kites and one of the deadliest snakes on earth.

programme.title: In The Kitchen With Abner And Amanda
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - On The Go Shawarma'. Abner and Amanda share the meal that feels like home on the road - shawarma on garlic flatbread with lemon tahini and cilantro sauce.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 - Chiang Mai'. Andrew Zimmern reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand, from coconut curry soup and a sausage with pork and chilli paste, to fish roasted in banana leaves.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S6/E6 - Phnom Penh'. Spicy grilled crab, cold and refreshing beef salad and herbaceous fish and noodle soup reflect a mission to preserve the uniqueness of Cambodian cuisine in Phnom Penh.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S49/E3 - Comfort Food Feud: Bacon'. The chefs aim for bacon perfection! The appetizer basket includes a Japanese condiment and a bacon-y bar food, with biscuit dough in the entree round.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S6/E3 - Thanksgiving It My All'. The eight remaining bakers are tasked with creating decorated apple cider doughnuts and transforming a classic yule log into a Thanksgiving roll cake.

programme.title: Best Bite In Town
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Paducah'. Noah Cappe heads to Paducah, Kentucky, with Aarti Sequeira and Joe Sasto. They dive into the local food scene, tasting everything from BBQ and BLTs to seafood.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S37/E2 - Meat And Sweet'. Guy Fieri seeks meat with a little sweet. In Santa Barbara, he visits a hidden gem serving Korean paella, then he visits a Boca Raton food truck.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S54/E5 - Casino Royale XL: Battle Four'. With a spot in the tournament's finale at stake, four chefs take on ingredients like the mysterious 'goat water' and a squirmy sea creature.

programme.title: Summer Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - Beach Day'. Jesse Palmers tasks the bakers to capture the coastal vibe using beach drink trifles! Then, they must create refreshing summer cream pies to avoid a scorching elimination.

programme.title: Holiday Wars
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Reindeer's New Hobby'. The six remaining teams face off for the first time as they must envision a hobby for Santa's reindeer to enjoy when they aren't pulling the sleigh.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S23/E8 - Lovin' In The Oven'. Geoffrey Zakarian makes beer braised pork roast with winter vegetables. Plus, baker Dan Langan stops by to make his baked apple brown butter blondies.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S49/E4 - Comfort Food Feud: Pizza'. The competition continues with a battle devoted to pizza. The chefs find spaghetti and meatballs in an unusual form in the entree basket.

programme.title: Selena + Chef: Home For The Holidays
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Selena + Eric'. Selena Gomez rings in the new year with Chef Eric Adjepong. Selena's skills are tested as she tackles shrimp and banana grits, scallop benedict, and malva pudding.

programme.title: Selena + Chef: Home For The Holidays
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Selena + Alex'. Selena and Chef Alex Guarnaschelli prepare for her tree-trimming party. The feast includes mozzarella sticks, black pepper roast beef and chocolate candy cane bark.

programme.title: Selena + Chef: Home For The Holidays
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Selena + Michael'. It's a surf-and-turf Christmas Eve as Michael Symon joins Selena Gomez in the kitchen. They cook up a lobster with homemade pasta and escarole salad.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S53/E5 - All-American Showdown: West'. Renowned chefs from across America compete in a five-part tournament. In this preliminary battle, four culinary greats from the West face off.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S53/E6 - All-American Showdown: South'. In this tournament battle, four Southern chefs open the appetiser basket and find some comfort foods to inspire them to lean into their culinary roots.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S53/E7 - All-American Showdown: North'. Four Northern chefs battle to see who will represent their region in the $50,000 finale, and they start off with a strange paste in the appetiser round.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S14/E7 - Farm To Tractor'. It's harvest time, so Molly makes a wheat truck lunch. She makes hearty fried chicken banh mi sandwich with a side of salt and vinegar potato salad.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S14/E8 - Meet In The Middle'. Molly makes Middle Eastern dishes with a Midwestern touch. She prepares squash falafel with spicy chipotle ranch and meaty twice baked potatoes.

programme.title: Selena + Chef: Home For The Holidays
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Selena + Alex'. Selena and Chef Alex Guarnaschelli prepare for her tree-trimming party. The feast includes mozzarella sticks, black pepper roast beef and chocolate candy cane bark.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Bermuda'. Andrew Zimmern explores the landscape and cuisine of Bermuda, a British territory with Caribbean soul. He has native dishes like fish chowder, spiny lobster and cassava pie.

programme.title: Cooking For Love
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Mummy's Boy'. Nik and Sarah treat a hardworking single mother to a surprise dinner. The Western fusion themed meal features sambal spaghetti and slow-roasted duck.

programme.title: Cooking For Love
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - The Unsung Hero'. Nik and Sarah celebrate a late husband's birthday with a Vietnamese-inspired dinner. Delicious dishes include beef pho and Vietnamese fish cakes.

programme.title: Ranch To Table
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Cowboy Way'. Elizabeth bakes a hummingbird breakfast cake to help fuel the cowboy crew. Later, she serves brisket sandwiches out of the tailgate of her pickup truck.

programme.title: Ranch To Table
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - A Ranch BBQ'. Elizabeth prepares a special barbecue dinner for her family visiting the ranch. She makes fresh baked herb focaccia with edible flowers and BBQ pork ribs.

programme.title: Summer Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Summer Feelings'. The bakers design summer travel memory desserts and make emotion cakes so that judges can experience ALL the feelings before choosing whose cake doesn't bring joy.

programme.title: Selena + Chef: Home For The Holidays
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Selena + Eric'. Selena Gomez rings in the new year with Chef Eric Adjepong. Selena's skills are tested as she tackles shrimp and banana grits, scallop benedict, and malva pudding.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S53/E8 - All-American Showdown: East'. Chefs from the East battle to make it to the final. For the appetiser, a dish from the Keystone State must be combined with a Big Apple cocktail.

programme.title: Selena + Restaurant
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Selena + Lemon Grove'. At Chef Marcel Vigneron's Lemon Grove, Selena Gomez creates a colourful dish with unusual ingredients. Will Marcel make the dish his new special?

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay (Holiday Throwdown)
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Holiday Throwdown: Celebrate!'. Jeff Mauro is in the house with an extravagant holiday feast featuring fancy ingredients and prime cuts designed to celebrate Bobby Flay's demise.

programme.title: 24 In 24: Last Chef Standing
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Shift 7: Simplicity'. The bruised and exhausted chefs show their skill with simplicity as Brooke Williamson decides which four chefs will receive a spot in the finale.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S58/E2 - Battle Italiano: Veneto'. The chefs showcase what they know about making amazing Venetian dishes. But a strikingly strange ingredient threatens to throw them off their game.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S56/E8 - Friendsgiving'. Celebrating the trendy tradition of hosting a Friendsgiving meal, four teams of best buddies compete to make the ultimate Thanksgiving feast.

programme.title: Christmas Cookie Challenge
programme.desc: 'S7/E3 - Redemption'. Cookie makers take a shot at redemption with cookies that call back to forgotten Christmas traditions and massive grandfather clocks.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S10/E3 - Hallmarks Of Thanksgiving'. Thanksgiving means food and football, so Jesse Palmer challenges the bakers to create holiday 7-layer desserts inspired by his favourite snack.

programme.title: Ultimate Survival
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Alaskan Mountain Range'. Bear faces the icy peaks of the Chugach Mountains, one of the toughest environments known. Each year, over one million people visit and 500 become stranded.

programme.title: Roadworthy Rescues
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Bandit Chevy'. Derek finds a 1951 Chevy Deluxe that's been sitting for 44 years. He needs to get it running and stopping if he hopes to tackle the Chattanooga hills and make it home.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: 'S8/E1 - JAG E-Type'. This classic Jag is one of the best-looking cars in the world and Mike gladly takes a risk on a wreck. But the price of parts is huge - will the project crash and burn?

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Treasure And Tragedy'. After finding evidence of a 1700s-era lifeboat near shore, Darrell and the team discover the shipwreck it came from. But a sudden tragedy hits the expedition.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: 'S3/E26 - The Long Road'. A major diagnosis shakes the Browns, forcing them to a decision that could change their lifelong journey. And oldest son Matt tries to adjust as he reunites with Noah.

programme.title: Car Fix
programme.desc: 'S10/E10 - Hearse With A Curse'. The guys bring in a 1924 Model T hearse to get it running again, and Fuller starts mocking up and building his Formula Ford race car.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S15/E4 - Episode 4'. Follow the amazing manufacturing processes behind flight simulators, traditional bookbinding, greenhouse tomatoes and hurricane-proof shutters.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Biggest Street Race Ever'. JJ Da Boss invites the fastest teams in the US to compete for $100,000. In round one, the underdogs from South Carolina take on the St. Louis team.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs
programme.desc: 'S5/E8 - Bug Detective'. Mike joins university students examining pig carcasses for maggots and other bugs to establish time of death. But will he be able to stomach their studies?

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: 'S15/E5 - Episode 5'. Follow the amazing manufacturing processes behind Worcestershire sauce, lawn bowls and radio-controlled model jets.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis
programme.desc: 'S1/E29 - Mid Atlantic Meltdown'. The MSO family takes on the Mid Atlantic Street Outlaws, whose awesome cars include a doorless dragster. Can Memphis keep up with the pace?

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis
programme.desc: 'S1/E30 - Small Tire Mountaineers'. The Memphis family is at an air strip in West Virginia for the small tyre event of JJ's Arm Drop, in a bid to take home the $15,000 prize.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - Pinsetter Mechanic'. Mike maintains a tenpin bowling lane. Plus, when a fan requests to see more of cameraman Doug, Mike obliges with some footage of him wading through shark poo.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Woolen Mill Operator'. Mike is in for some hair-raising adventures, waxing his old friend Barsky at a Michigan day spa, and learning how to spin yarn old school style in Ohio.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - The Columbus Treasure'. The discovery of a lifetime becomes a massive salvage operation. Pulling up and verifying Columbus' anchor might be the biggest challenge yet.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - 500 Million Dollar List'. Last season, Miklos located a shipwreck tied to Christopher Columbus using Cooper's intel. Now, Miklos has 8 weeks of cash left to find another shipwreck.

programme.title: Mega Shippers
programme.desc: 'S1/E8'. More logistical headaches when one load master stows £100million of super yacht onto a vessel carrier. Plus an operations supervisor loads a rare three-wheeled sports car.

programme.title: World's Biggest Shipbuilders
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Mega Yards'. In the South Korean shipyards of Okpo and Sungdong, two teams are building a giant tanker - the Maersk Tangier - along with the world's biggest jack-up rig - the XLE4.

programme.title: Speed Is The New Black
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Mini Car, Mega Power'. The team rebuild a 1972 Mini for its speed-loving owner so she can race her boyfriend and enjoy country drives. A huge horsepower upgrade makes it a beast!

programme.title: Speed Is The New Black
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Chevelle Reborn - Part 1'. A client wants to rebuild his first dream car, a wrecked 1971 Chevelle. Starting from nothing but a bare frame, the team begins to give it a new life.

programme.title: Speed Is The New Black
programme.desc: 'S2/E10 - Chevelle Reborn - Part 2'. With new demands from their client, the team fights to finish the 1971 Chevelle revamp. It features Ferrari-inspired custom touches and a new power plant.

programme.title: Roadworthy Rescues
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Swamp-Stang'. Derek extracts a 1967 Ford Mustang that has sat dormant for 28 years, but rust and neglect won't stop him from transforming it into a new creation.

programme.title: Roadworthy Rescues
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Bandit Chevy'. Derek finds a 1951 Chevy Deluxe that's been sitting for 44 years. He needs to get it running and stopping if he hopes to tackle the Chattanooga hills and make it home.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: 'S3/E10 - Earl Campbell's Custom Cadillac'. The crew creates a ground-up build for NFL legend Earl Campbell's 1949 Cadillac. Plus, a 1940 F-100 build snowballs into a much bigger job.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Low And Loud'. The team drops a new 2020 Denali dually to the floor, so make one of their longest custom chassis ever. And, they get a pro-mod Bel Air back on the track.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: 'S4/E5 - Show And Go Dually'. Ekstensive turns a stock 2020 Denali dually into frame-dropping, show-stopping work truck. As a final touch, Bill handmakes articulating speakers for the bed.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - Beantown Continental'. A '64 Lincoln has been collecting dust for years. The guys bring this classic roadster back with a late-model Coyote engine and handmade interior.

programme.title: Dude, You're Screwed
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Pain In The Neck'. A Green Beret is dropped unprepared into Transylvania, where he's at risk from starvation and hypothermia. Even worse, he has more than one mouth to feed.

programme.title: Flying Wild Alaska

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: 'S3/E22 - All Falls Down'. Hopes for the wind turbine are threatened when Bear and Gabe make an error. Noah and Rhain reunite and Matt takes on a project to increase Browntown's food storage.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: 'S3/E23 - Field Of Dreams'. Billy gets overambitious on a late barter as the family tries to secure their winter stores. Plus, a rogue bear plays havoc with Browntown and a nearby logging camp.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Why Monkeys Swing In The Trees'. There was a time when Monkey used to play on the ground and he loved to wind up Crocodile. What happened to make Monkey swing in the trees? Tales from Africa.

programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Why Tickbird Sits On Hippos Back'. There was a time when Tickbird didn't sit on Hippo's back, in fact they weren't friends at all! How did they become friends?

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Why Frog Croaks'. There was a time when Frog didn't croak. Frog sang like a bird... and the birds didn't like it. Birds were the masters of song and that's the way it should be!

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Why Spider Has A Tiny Waist'. There was a time when Spider didn't have a tiny waist. She was all big and round... and did she like her food!

programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - The Case Of The Slippery Stage'. Pat-Pat is meant to be giving a baton twirling display at the Town Hall but the stage is covered with the sticky stuff.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective

programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - The Case Of The Dazzle Dragon'. Everyone in Fable Fields is very worried that a new Dazzle Dragon has appeared in the land.

programme.desc: 'S1/E19'. The Prophet (PBUH) said, 'There is a surah in the Qur'an which is only thirty verses. It defends whoever recites it, until it puts him into paradise and is the protector from the torment of the grave'.

programme.title: The Blessing Of Time
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. It is important that we are able to use our time wisely. In effect, when you waste your time, you are wasting the precious resource Allah SWT has given us. Your time is your life.

programme.title: Judgment Day: Deeds that Light the Way
programme.desc: 'S1/E15'. Join Sheikh Omar Suleiman to glimpse into the eternity you are building. Learn what worldly actions will ease your reckoning and light your way on the path to Paradise.

programme.title: Live Crossing For Esha From Makkah
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Live crossover to the Holy Mosque in Makkah Mukarramah for live Prayers with imagery

programme.title: The Deen Show
programme.desc: 'S1/E29'. Eddie' Deen strives to provide the correct information about Islam to Muslims and non-Muslims alike sharing the true message of Pure Islam without cultural, traditional or nationalistic prejudices and corruption.

programme.title: Pivot With Quraysha Ismail
programme.desc: 'S1/E26'. Get ready to experience the power of dynamic dialogues. Join Quraysha for energetic discussions with thought leaders and everyday Heroes.

programme.title: Enjoy Your Life By Moulana Bobat
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Inspired by the book, Enjoy your Life, by Dr Al Arifi, this show takes you on an inspiring journey of the Sirah of our Nabi SAW, teaching us the conduct of our Nabi SAW with various people in different roles.

programme.title: Still Occupied
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Still occupied take you through the decades long occupation of Palestine and subjugation of the Palestinian people.

programme.title: Gaza: 60 Minute Warning
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. In May 2021, missiles from Israeli jets struck and completely demolished four towers in Gaza - that is a fact. What was not clear was the reason for the attacks. Why were these buildings selected for destruction?

programme.title: Quran Circle 8
programme.desc: 'S1/E12'. Melodious recitations of the Holy Quran by International Quran reciters, Sheikh Ibrahim Zidan take us through the beautiful verses from the Holy Quran.

programme.title: The Seventh Curse
programme.desc: Dr Yuen is cursed while rescuing a girl in Thailand and must also find the cure to save himself. In comes Wesley to help him get the antidote from evil sorcerers and monsters.

programme.title: To Kill with Intrigue
programme.desc: Cao Lei escapes after a female gang leader killed his parents and family for revenge. He vows to take revenge but the gang leader falls for him at the same time...

programme.title: 3AM The Campsite
programme.desc: A group of friends going on a camping trip inside a haunted forest encounters a series of paranormal events. When dawn breaks, who will get out of the forest alive?

programme.title: Munitions Hijacking Case
programme.desc: An undercover agent must find and destroy some munitions. He is outnumbered by a group of gangsters after finding them and needs help from a partner to stop a disaster.

programme.title: Royal Warriors
programme.desc: When a Hong Kong policewoman, a Japanese detective and a security officer foil a plane hijacking attempt, they incur the wrath of the hijackers who are out for vengeance.

programme.title: Heart Of Dragon
programme.desc: This is a heart-warming and touching story about the brotherhood between a top cop and his mentally disabled brother.

programme.title: Iceman The Time Traveler
programme.desc: In this sequel, the four imperial guards are defrosted and reanimated in modern times. With different motives in mind, they strive to find their way back in time...

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In Shanghai
programme.desc: A laborer moves to Shanghai in the hope of becoming rich but has to use his kung fu skills to survive, as well as to take revenge against the gang who killed his brother.

programme.title: Wild Search
programme.desc: In a gun trafficking raid, a police officer finds the little girl who witnessed her mother's murder by the ruthless gunrunners, and must protect her from being killed.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II
programme.desc: In this sequel, the four turtles must stop Shredder from using the last canister of the ooze to create dangerous turtles and unleash an army of new mutants.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: An underground boxer loses his memory while escaping from the Bangkok triad. When he regains his memory after starting anew, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: A military veteran and an undercover cop lead a team to rescue the hostages captured by a band of thugs in an island outside of Bangkok.

programme.title: Mr Vampire II
programme.desc: Grave robbing archeologists discover vampires immobilized by paper spells. While transporting them, the vampires revive and escape. A local herbalist sets out to destroy them.

programme.title: The Last Blood
programme.desc: The Dalai Lama and Bee's girlfriend are injured by the Red Army. Bee must find the only 3 donors with rare blood type P in 12 hours and fight against the terrorists to save them.

programme.title: In the Line of Duty III
programme.desc: Two notorious thieves escape to Hong Kong after committing a jewellery heist in Japan. Madam Yeung and a Japanese inspector must team up to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Double Barrel
programme.desc: A former drug trafficker is forced by the police to kill a drug cartel boss. When his wife joins the operation to save her family, a fierce battle soon begins!

programme.title: High Road to China
programme.desc: Set in 1920s, a spoiled heiress hires a tipsy biplane pilot and his sidekick to find her missing father in China.

programme.title: Toks & Tjops

programme.title: Prontuit

programme.title: Met 'n Huppel In Die Stap

programme.title: Riki Rhino: The Bird Kingdom

programme.title: Boonie Bears: Guardian Code
programme.desc: A fun, moving ninth film in the Boonie Bears franchise. Young Briar and Bramble lose their mother in a forest fire. Many years later, they uncover a clue relating to her

programme.title: The Emoji Movie

programme.title: Mummies
programme.desc: An adventure-filled animation with a genuine sense of humour. Three mummies journey to present-day London, searching for an old ring belonging to a royal family.

programme.desc: Tiffany Haddish and Rose Byrne go toe-to-toe with Salma Hayek in this comedy. Two friends with very different ideals start a beauty company, but it is endangered of being stolen.

programme.desc: 'The Good Father: The Martin Macneill Story'. A thriller based on a true story. A young woman becomes suspicious of her father after her mother dies under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: Fatal Fandom
programme.desc: A gripping thriller. A pop star hires a handsome bodyguard to move into her home and provide full-time security, but the man soon turns from protector to predator.

programme.title: Blank
programme.desc: An intriguing sci-fi thriller. A writer suffering from writer's block attends an AI-operated retreat, but things go haywire when she finds herself trapped with an unstable robot.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Neal McDonough returns as ruthless hitman Boon. As Boon looks to retire, he finds himself facing a criminal gang in a bid to protect a mother and her son.

programme.title: Muru

programme.title: Inception

programme.title: Central Intelligence
programme.desc: Action hero Dwayne Johnson and funnyman Kevin Hart team up for a laugh-a-minute comedy. A mild-mannered accountant is sucked into the spy game by an old high school pal.

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: Ezra Miller breaks time and space in this superhero epic. Barry Allen uses his super speed to change the past, but his attempt to save his family has unforeseen circumstances.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this action drama stars Liam Hemsworth as a security guard who gets the attention of a veteran NYPD officer when he's drawn into a high-stakes heist.

programme.title: Man Of Steel
programme.desc: From the visionary mind that brought you The Dark Knight. A young Superman discovers his true origins. Expect action-fuelled clashes between the caped hero and the forces of evil.

programme.title: Medieval

programme.title: The Corruptor
programme.desc: East meets West in this film starring Yun-Fat Chow and Mark Wahlberg. Two New York officers and team up to take down a Chinese Triad operation.

programme.title: The Curse Of Rosalie
programme.desc: A mystery-filled horror. A couple moves to a quaint Midwestern town. When their daughter seems to be threatened with eternal damnation, the family turns to a Native American seer

programme.title: Dotty & Soul
programme.desc: A hilarious, heartfelt comedy. A hotshot entrepreneur embroiled in a scandal hires a 71-year-old woman to pose as CEO in a bid to save his company's reputation.

programme.title: A Picture Perfect Holiday
programme.desc: Romance is in the picture in this fun, charming Christmas romcom in which a fashion photographer attending a photography retreat is double-booked with a wildlife photographer.

programme.title: A Dog's Journey
programme.desc: A magical canine story. A dog finds its purpose as it lives many lives through its bonds with a family, first with a young boy and then eventually with the boy's granddaughter.

programme.title: The Amazing Panda Adventure
programme.desc: A touching live-action animal adventure. A young boy helps his zoologist father save a panda cub captured by poachers from a Chinese wildlife preserve.

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out Of...
programme.desc: The Spongebob Movie: Sponge Out Of Water. A great SpongeBob film. SpongeBob and his enemy team up to retrieve the stolen, Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: Pixels

programme.title: Major Payne

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: The aca-mazing acapella group are back for an encore in this musical comedy. The girls reunite for one last overseas military tour, where they face tough competition from other bands.

programme.title: I Am Legend

programme.title: Men In Black: International

programme.title: 300: Rise Of An Empire

programme.title: The Gods Father

programme.title: Paint My Love
programme.desc: A local lady runs into an old friend who wants her to pretend as his lover, but true love sets in the process of pretending.

programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - Washing My Sheen/Stuck In The Riddle With You'. Sheen vows to never bathe again and attracts a horde of filth-loving beasts, then must save his friends from a carnivorous plant.

programme.title: T.U.F.F. Puppy
programme.desc: 'S1/E10 - Dog Dish/Watch Dog'. Dudley must wear a cone, which actually comes in handy. Dudley uses time travel to beat Kitty to the snacks, but ends up in a world where Snaptrap is in charge!

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: 'S3/E16 - Party At Sea!'. Anchor's away! It's time to celebrate boats with a party at sea! But when a giant ball of snow cone ice threatens to sink the party ship, can the Guppies save the day?

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Surfin' the Cave, Top Wing Rescues the Lemon Shack'. A falling tree threatens Shirley's home. The Cadets invite her to sleep over, and she helps guide their rescue. Betty McBat challenges Rod to see who's faster.

programme.title: Top Wing
programme.desc: 'S1/E23 - Junior Cadets Rescue, Sunken Treasure Race'. The Cadets try to give Bea a day off, but when Swift's jet goes haywire, they need Bea to race to the rescue! The Cadets compete in the Big Swirl Games.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S7/E16 - Trenchbillies / Sponge-Cano'. SpongeBob and Patrick fall into a cavern where frightful Trenchbillies keep them hostage. Squidward's complaints trigger a volcanic eruption.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S7/E17 - The Great Patty Caper'. SpongeBob, Patrick and Plankton solve a mystery on a runaway train.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S7/E18 - That Sinking Feeling/Karate Star'. SpongeBob and Patrick dig a tunnel between their two houses and drive Squidward nuts. Pat learns just enough karate to wreak havoc in Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S7/E19 - Buried In Time/Enchanted Tiki Dreams'. SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward are accidentally locked in Bikini Bottom's first time capsule. SpongeBob and Patrick build a dream world for Squidward.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S7/E20 - The Abrasive Side/Earworm'. SpongeBob can never say 'no' to anyone, so he orders a product called the 'abrasive side'. SpongeBob gets a song stuck in his head.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: 'S7/E21 - Hide And Then What Happens? / Shellback Shenanigans'. SpongeBob and Patrick play Hide 'N' Seek and SpongeBob searches the world for Patrick. Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
